title: glyptopetalum zeylanicum
intro: Glyptopetalum zeylanicum, also known as the Sri Lankan moonseed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Glyptopetalum zeylanicum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating digestive issues, and alleviating stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
